title: UP Police SI, ASI Final Result 2026
description: UP Police SI and ASI recruitment 2026 final result has been declared. Candidates can check complete exam schedule including admit card, PET/PST, typing and steno test dates.
faq1: UP Police SI, ASI Final Result 2026 was declared on 26 March 2026.
faq2: Written exam was conducted on 02 November 2025.
faq3: Candidates can check result on the official website uppbpb.gov.in.
